name: eyay-toolkits
description: Personal Claude Code plugins. Built for shipping systems, not essays. If it helps you, steal it.

plugins.name: technical-writer
plugins.description: Write technical documentation, articles, reviews, and postmortems in a storytelling style that's direct, humble, and problem-first.

plugins.name: evm-decimal-validation
plugins.description: Validate and configure token decimals for EVM-compatible blockchain deployments to prevent amount calculation errors.

plugins.name: code-optimize
plugins.description: Optimize code for performance, readability, or maintainability covering N+1 queries, caching, race conditions, and async patterns.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review code for quality, security, and adherence to project patterns with structured checklist.

plugins.name: prisma-schema
plugins.description: Create or modify Prisma schema for new entities with proper conventions, relations, and indexes.

plugins.name: worktree-new
plugins.description: Create git worktrees with isolated ports for parallel development.
